intro: Astragalus membranaceus tincture is a herbal remedy derived from the root of the astragalus plant, which has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries to boost the immune system and enhance overall well-being. The tincture is believed to have adaptogenic properties, helping the body to adapt to stress and promoting balance in the body's natural functions. When taken as directed, astragalus membranaceus tincture may help to reduce fatigue, improve immune function, and support overall health and resilience.
